title: Fixture record with broken references
official_title: Fixture Official Title for the Broken Record
summary: A fixture record that violates referential integrity: branch level theme, unknown leaf, unknown authority, missing relationship target, and an inverse relationship type.
impact_note: This record exists only to exercise the validator error paths. Every reference in it is deliberately broken so the smoke test can assert that each class of failure is caught and reported with a useful message.
notes: Validator fixture, not a real instrument.
